Implements the Apple Media Service (AMS) client, defines related types and UUIDs, and provides utility functions for BLE communication.


## Files
- **[ams.c](ams.c.md)**: Implements the Apple Media Service (AMS) client for handling BLE communication and music control.
- **[ams.h](ams.h.md)**: Implements an Apple Media Service (AMS) client for BLE communication, including characteristic handling and testing functions.
- **[ams_analytics.h](ams_analytics.h.md)**: Defines the `AMSAnalyticsEvent` enum for tracking various error events in BLE communication.
- **[ams_definition.h](ams_definition.h.md)**: Defines UUIDs for the AMS service and its characteristics in the Pebble firmware.
- **[ams_types.h](ams_types.h.md)**: Defines types, enumerations, and packet formats for Apple Media Service (AMS) communication.
- **[ams_util.c](ams_util.c.md)**: Utility functions for parsing C-strings into integers and parsing comma-separated values.
- **[ams_util.h](ams_util.h.md)**: Functions for parsing strings into integers and parsing CSV strings with a callback mechanism.
